TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Saviki ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 577 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 568 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 95%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Saviki hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saviki hya' ga Sinvi. tay 'llaw na Saviki hya' ga Niae' ucna. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*iki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Saviki ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 577 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 568 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 95%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Saviki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Saviki hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saviki hya' ga Sinvi. tay 'llaw na Saviki hya' ga Niae' ucna. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕa*iki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕa*iki ħjaʔ ɣa niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
